sentiment.summary: Markets bouncing after 3 straight losing weeks as oil retreats from Iran-conflict highs, but Fed rate decision tomorrow keeps the rebound cautious.

insights.text: Relief rally, but don't pop the champagne. S&P up 1% and BTC above $75K as oil cools from the Iran spike. VIX dropped 13.5% to 23.51, showing real fear reduction. Fed decision tomorrow is the true test — stay nimble until then.

BTC breaks above your $73,135 cost basis and charges $75K. Up 25% from the February $60K bottom, $700M in March ETF inflows, and shorts getting liquidated. March would break a 5-month losing streak. Fed decision tomorrow is the next catalyst.

RKLB at $71.31 — up 15% from your ~$62 cost basis. Record 2025 revenue of $602M (+38% YoY), $1.85B backlog up 73%, and an $816M SDA prime contract in hand. Analyst avg target $89. One of your strongest positions right now.

SATS at $114.08 — right at your $114.33 cost basis. 308% rally over 12 months reflects the transformation story, but $14.5B net loss in 2025 from non-cash impairments is a fundamental overhang. Boost Mobile iPhone 17e launch adds a consumer angle. Watch closely.

T1 Energy at $7.62 — up 13% from your ~$6.73 avg cost. Strong Buy consensus, avg target $10.71. New 900 MW 3-year supply deal with Treaty Oak, G2_Austin fab production starts end of 2026. Domestic solar with real contracts — solid hold.

STX at $409 — down 9% from your $448.98 entry. Q2 revenue +22% YoY and $607M free cash flow show the AI storage thesis is intact. Analyst avg target $475 points to recovery. Macro-driven pain — hold for the hyperscaler storage cycle to reprice this.

TSAT at ~$36.56 — above your $33.33 cost basis and recovering. Q4 beat EPS by $2.07, won a SHIELD U.S. defence contract in February, and Lightspeed LEO first satellites launch late 2026. High risk but catalysts are stacking up fast.

BBAI at $3.95 — down 56% from your $9.02 cost. Down 21% last month, Q4 revenue missed, defence AI competition is brutal. No clear near-term catalyst visible. Deep in the hole — seriously reassess position sizing or cut losses.

NBIS surging to $129.85 — nearly back to your $131.12 cost basis. A $27B Meta AI infrastructure deal and a fresh $2B Nvidia investment in the same week is enormous. Strong Buy consensus, avg target $168. This is the AI infrastructure trade of the quarter.

OKLO at $59.93 — down 52% from your $125 cost basis. Q4 earnings call is TODAY after the close — watch it. 1.2 GW Meta deal is real but delivery is 2030+. Stock is down 70% from ATH $194. Nuclear thesis lives, but patience will be tested further.

NVTS at $10.10 — essentially at your $10.00 cost basis. Spiked 20.7% on March 11 on new AI data center GaN/SiC power platform news. New CFO joins March 30. Next earnings May 7. Power semiconductor for AI is a strong thesis — hold and accumulate on dips.
